tool.name: etsy_bulk_search
tool.description: Search multiple products on Etsy in parallel using concurrent browser tabs. Use this instead of calling etsy_search multiple times - it is faster and more efficient. Pass all queries as a single comma-separated string. Example: 'handmade jewelry,custom mugs,vintage clothing'.

parameters.name: queries
parameters.description: Comma-separated search queries (e.g. 'handmade ring,custom necklace,vintage brooch')
